name: @robocodejs/server
description: RobocodeJs API server and game-simulation engine — an Express + TypeScript API with the isolated-vm bot sandbox.

scripts.dev: fuser -k 8080/tcp & nodemon --watch src -e ts,ejs --exec npm run dev:start
scripts.lint: npx prettier --write src test && npx eslint src --fix
scripts.package: npm version patch && npm shrinkwrap && zip -r robocodejs-$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").zip ./ -x 'src/*' -x 'test/*' -x 'coverage/*' -x '*.git' -x '*robocodejs*zip*' -x '*artifact.zip*' -x '*node_modules*'

author: Lee Adcock <lee@robocodejs.com>
